channel.title: Poems on Blogs of Abhinav Babu
channel.description: Recent content in Poems on Blogs of Abhinav Babu

item.title: Thunder Nearby
item.description:
Today, I woke up in the silent noise of a rainy day.
While watching it, a distant thunder whispered in my ears:
The world is very big!
At the same time I felt it closer than ever!
